shared_numbering_notes.reason: GitHub's shared issue and pull-request sequence assigned number 13 to the bootstrap pull request, not to a missing backlog issue.

claim_boundary: GitHub issues and PRs are coordination records only. This handoff does not approve tasks, promote readiness, prove implementation, prove benchmark results, or support Chrome-class, production, release, compatibility, performance, security, accessibility, beta, stable, daily-driver, or public product claims.

issues.title: [M0] Validate Blueprint v1, schemas, CI, and repository evidence
issues.disposition: Closed after the M0 repository validation and evidence foundation landed on main.
next_proof: Reopen only if validation, CI, required docs, or source hygiene drift.

issues.title: [M1] Implement kernel identities, process roles, capabilities, and bounded IPC
issues.disposition: M0 reference exists, but the machine backlog keeps WP-002 in progress.

issues.title: [M1] Build cross-platform renderer sandbox probe harnesses
issues.disposition: Contract, catalog, schema, templates, and issue body are current on main; executable probes are still missing.

issues.title: [M1] Prototype the native accessible shell and crash-resilient browser chrome
issues.disposition: Native-shell lane has checked no-claim inventories and review template only.

issues.title: [M1/M5] Implement tab lifecycle, resource attribution, and the 30-tab simulator
issues.disposition: Prototype has lifecycle concepts; full resource attribution and 30-tab evidence remain open.

issues.title: [M2] Build the static document engine: HTML, DOM, CSS, layout, paint, and accessibility
issues.disposition: Static engine work is sequenced but not started as an accepted build task.

issues.title: [M3/M6] Implement the JavaScript interpreter, exact GC, Web IDL, and tiering gates
issues.disposition: Runtime work remains future milestone scope.

issues.title: [M4] Implement navigation, site assignment, scoped networking, and partitioned storage
issues.disposition: Network, storage, and navigation work remain gated by process, IPC, sandbox, and schema decisions.

issues.title: [M2/M5] Define the versioned DevTools, tracing, headless, and automation platform
issues.disposition: Protocol and tooling are planned but not executable product capability.

issues.title: [M6] Build the capability-safe agent reference and adversarial evaluation suite
issues.disposition: Agent architecture is documented; reference implementation and adversarial suite remain open.

issues.title: [M5] Build the signed update, rollback, migration, and release-evidence laboratory
issues.disposition: Research package/update lab has checked no-claim templates only.

issues.title: [M5/M7] Establish the fixed-hardware compatibility, performance, memory, and energy laboratory
issues.disposition: Benchmark planning evidence exists; no browser benchmark result exists.

issues.title: [research] Build the fixed-hardware browser engine baseline harness
issues.disposition: Research issue remains open because the harness has not produced browser-run evidence.

pull_request_cleanup.title: Specify WP-003 cross-platform sandbox probes
pull_request_cleanup.reason: Raw merge was unsafe because the draft branch was stale and would delete current repository state; additive evidence was ported onto main.

pull_request_cleanup.title: Add complete implementation master plan
pull_request_cleanup.reason: Raw merge was unsafe because the draft branch was stale and would delete current repository state; additive implementation-plan artifacts were ported onto main.
